{
  ReadModel:
<?php
// <auto-generated/>
declare(strict_types=1);

namespace Koine\Sales\ReadModels;

use Koine\Sales\Entities\Order;
use Koine\Sales\Enums\OrderStatus;
use Koine\Sales\ValueObjects\CustomerId;
use Koine\Sales\ValueObjects\OrderId;

final readonly class OrderSummary
{
    public function __construct(
        public OrderId $id,
        public CustomerId $customer,
        public OrderStatus $status,
        public int $lineCount
    ) {}
}

/** Projects Order to OrderSummary. */
function toOrderSummary(Order $src): OrderSummary
{
    return new OrderSummary(
        $src->id,
        $src->customer,
        $src->status,
        count($src->lines),
    );
}
,
  ListQuery:
<?php
// <auto-generated/>
declare(strict_types=1);

namespace Koine\Sales\Queries;

use Koine\Runtime\QueryHandler;
use Koine\Sales\Enums\OrderStatus;

/** Query returning array; handled by OrdersByStatusHandler. */
final readonly class OrdersByStatus
{
    public function __construct(
        public OrderStatus $status
    ) {}
}

/** Handles OrdersByStatus, returning array. */
interface OrdersByStatusHandler extends QueryHandler
{
    /** @return array */
    public function handle(mixed $query): mixed;
}
,
  SingleQuery:
<?php
// <auto-generated/>
declare(strict_types=1);

namespace Koine\Sales\Queries;

use Koine\Runtime\QueryHandler;
use Koine\Sales\ReadModels\OrderSummary;
use Koine\Sales\ValueObjects\OrderId;

/** Query returning OrderSummary; handled by OrderByIdHandler. */
final readonly class OrderById
{
    public function __construct(
        public OrderId $id
    ) {}
}

/** Handles OrderById, returning OrderSummary. */
interface OrderByIdHandler extends QueryHandler
{
    /** @return OrderSummary */
    public function handle(mixed $query): mixed;
}

}
